reason: Incorrect traditional form; 闹 (nào) corresponds to traditional 鬧, not 閙.

old: He understands the interior situation of this organization.
new: He understands the internal workings of this organization.
reason: 'Interior situation' is unnatural English; 'internal workings' is more idiomatic.

old: The accompaniment of friends made him feel warm.
new: The company of friends made him feel warm.
reason: 'Accompaniment' is unnatural here; 'company' is the standard English word for this sense of 陪伴.

old: These two colors join together and look beautiful.
new: These two colors go together and look beautiful.
reason: 'Join together' mistranslates 配 in this 'match' context; 'go together' is idiomatic.

old: This top and those trousers join together well.
new: This top and those trousers go together well.
reason: 'Join together' is unnatural for 配 meaning 'match/go well with'.
掽 is non-standard; the traditional form of 碰 (pèng) is 碰 (unchanged in traditional Chinese).

old: 他的跳远成绩平了世界纪录。
new: 这支球队平了上届冠军的得分纪录。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1 — both show a person's performance tying a record; different scenario needed.

old: His long jump result matched the world record.
new: This team matched the scoring record of the previous champion.

reason: Standard traditional form of simplified 凭 is 憑, not 凴.

old: 凭你怎么解释，我都不接受。
new: 凭他多努力，她都不原谅他。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1 — both feature 凭…怎么 + speech act with rejection; different subject and context needed.

old: No matter how you explain it, I won't accept it.
new: No matter how hard he tried, she would not forgive him.

reason: Standard traditional form of 凭 is 憑.

old: He had his favorite celebrity sign his name for him.
new: He had his favorite celebrity sign an autograph for him.
reason: 'Sign his name for him' is ambiguous; 明星签名 means getting a celebrity's autograph.

old: 这个计划切合实际，可以执行。
new: 他的解决方案切合问题的实际情况。
reason: Near-duplicate of row 4188 sentence_1 — both use 切合实际 in nearly identical contexts; different framing needed.

old: This plan fits the actual situation and can be implemented.
new: His solution jibes with the actual circumstances of the problem.

old: 他说话亲切，大家都喜欢他。
new: 服务员对每位顾客都很亲切。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_2 — both describe a person speaking/behaving amiably; needs a different context.

old: He speaks in an amiable way and everyone likes him.
new: The server was very amiable to every customer.
